title: Adiantopsis dichotoma
taxonomy: Adiantopsis dichotoma is a species of fern in the family Vittariaceae. It belongs to the genus Adiantopsis, which is a type of vittarioid fern. The family Vittariaceae is a group of small to large ferns that are typically epiphytic or terrestrial. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns. The classification of Adiantopsis dichotoma provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and its place within the fern kingdom.
